title: REBD-487 Yui Cutie Pretty Doll Yui Kawai
description: The lead role of this work is Yui Kawai! !! Yui, who is refreshing and cute, is a beautiful girl with an innocent smile! !! While slender, the D-cup bust is enough to make you attractive as an adult woman! !! Because of the young atmosphere, cute costumes such as uniforms and polka dot pants are outstandingly addictive! !! This is the first time I shot an image work, but Yui, who is curious, handles all the scenes brightly and aggressively. The scene I want you to see is the scene where you lick the candy, and the scene where you look deliciously licking is also involuntarily drooling! !! A beautiful girl with a doll-like coquettishness and expressiveness fascinates her brother! !! [* This work is an image video]
